_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: We identified loss of H3K27me3 in 45 of 82 (55%) of MPNSTs with IHC data available
details: Successfully used for immunohistochemistry to classify MPNSTs into H3K27me3 retained vs H3K27me3 loss groups, with loss detected in 45 of 82 (55%) of MPNSTs
